creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
It was reported on the mailing list [1], on the builder [2] and it also fails on my board
RUST_BACKTRACE=1 seems to be the culprit

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-arm/2021-June/000255.html
[2] http://ampere2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/main-arm64-default/pc9afda5a14a3_sb43d600c83/logs/errors/rust-1.52.1.log
